description: 1:1 meeting with ambiguous duration. With memory: 30-minute event. Without memory: 60-minute default.

events.title: 1:1 with David
events.reasoning: Alice and David agreed to a 1:1 on Thursday at 11am. Based on Alice's known preference, her 1:1s are 30 minutes.
events.assumptions: Duration set to 30 minutes based on Alice's known 1:1 preference.

mock_llm_response.summary: Found 1 meeting event: 30-minute 1:1 on Thursday at 11am.

events.title: 1:1 with David
events.reasoning: Alice and David agreed to a 1:1 meeting on Thursday at 11am. No duration specified, using default 1 hour.
events.assumptions: Duration not specified, defaulting to 60 minutes.

mock_llm_response_no_memory.summary: Found 1 meeting event: 1-hour 1:1 on Thursday at 11am.

notes: Reference datetime is 2026-02-20 (Friday), so 'next Thursday' resolves to 2026-02-26. Delta: end_time differs (11:30 vs 12:00 — 30min vs 60min duration).
